_notes.purpose: First domestic profile (Iter-6). Synthetic US SaaS / professional-services loan scenario — numerics are illustrative and pending live-source binding in Iter-7+ when snapshot pipelines mature. Components in declared order [base_sofr, demand_volatility, payment_cycle, wc] match design-v1-risk-factor-catalog.md §Component-to-audience-matrix 'Domestic services' column. Inherits skeleton + stress_timing from _base_domestic.json.
_notes.industry_choice: applies_to.industry='services' is the schema-permitted slot. State.business_identity.mode='domestic_services' will be matched to this profile by profile_resolver's domestic branch (Iter-6 deliverable 7). NAICS sector 54 (Professional, Scientific, Technical Services) lives in state, not in this profile, since the schema has no naics field.
_notes.source_strategy: All source.type='config_file' per Iter-6 Flag-2 resolution (LEGAL_SOURCE_TYPES unchanged from Iter-5 — 'snapshot' is NOT added as a 4th type). source.ref points to Iter-6 fixture paths under backend/tests/fixtures/snapshots/; snapshot_date stamps the reference date. Live API binding scheduled for Iter-7+.
_notes.synthetic_values_warning: PMI / DSO / sensitivity values below are ILLUSTRATIVE for the Iter-6 E2E acceptance test. They are NOT sourced from current ISM, BLS, Atradius, or Intuit releases. Replace with snapshot-pinned real values when those pipelines exist. base_sofr FED_PATH numbers (4.50/5.50/4.75) DO match V1 anchor values — the US base rate is shared with export-import US-importer scenarios.
_notes.doc_debt_anchor: Iter-plan §1 Iter-6 acceptance literal text reads source_type:'snapshot'; reconciled here to 'config_file' per Flag-2. Doc-debt fix to iter-plan text lands in Iter-6 deliverable 11.

source.citation: V1 inline FED_PATH (initial 4.50%, peak 5.50%, final 4.75%); the US base rate applies identically to US-domestic and US-importer export-import scenarios. Live binding: FRED SOFR + Fed dot-plot in Iter-7+.

Synthetic Iter-6 fixture (pmi_current=48.0 indicates mild contraction; pmi_neutral=50.0 is the PMI convention). Live binding: ISM Services PMI monthly release in Iter-7+. Formula spec per design-v1-risk-factor-catalog.md §b.1.

Synthetic Iter-6 fixture; observed DSO 58d vs services-sector median 35d represents late-paying enterprise customers. Live binding: Atradius PPB annual + Intuit QuickBooks SMB Late Payments in Iter-7+. Formula spec per design-v1-risk-factor-catalog.md §b.5.

V1 inline WC values (30bps base / 50bps peak) carried forward as illustrative domestic baseline. Live binding: FRED ISRATIO + sector inventory-to-sales in Iter-7+; for services the relevant working-capital driver is closer to payroll/AR cycles than inventory.
